title: Recognise signs of emergency and notifiable animal diseases
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Recognise signs of emergency and notifiable animal diseases demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify the major EADs related to food animals

pcs.text: Locate and identify the purpose of the Emergency Animal Disease Response Agreement (EADRA)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate and identify the purpose of the Emergency Animal Disease Response Agreement (EADRA)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate and identify the purpose of the Emergency Animal Disease Response Agreement (EADRA).

pcs.text: Identify the major EADs of food animals processed in Australia
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the major EADs of food animals processed in Australia?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the major EADs of food animals processed in Australia.

pcs.text: Identify and describe the signs of major EADs as they may be seen at ante-mortem
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and describe the signs of major EADs as they may be seen at ante-mortem?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and describe the signs of major EADs as they may be seen at ante-mortem.

pcs.text: Identify and describe the signs of major EADs as typically seen at post-mortem if present
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and describe the signs of major EADs as typically seen at post-mortem if present?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and describe the signs of major EADs as typically seen at post-mortem if present.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify the major EADs related to food animals

elements.title: Identify the reporting process for suspected EADs

pcs.text: Identify the responsibilities for reporting EAD suspects as set out in the workplace emergency disease preparedness plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the responsibilities for reporting EAD suspects as set out in the workplace emergency disease preparedness plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the responsibilities for reporting EAD suspects as set out in the workplace emergency disease preparedness plan.

pcs.text: Identify the meat processing workplace’s responsibilities after reporting a suspected EAD outbreak
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the meat processing workplace’s responsibilities after reporting a suspected EAD outbreak?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the meat processing workplace’s responsibilities after reporting a suspected EAD outbreak.

pcs.text: Identify and explain the role of the Australian Veterinary Emergency Plan (AUSVETPLAN) in controlling EADs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and explain the role of the Australian Veterinary Emergency Plan (AUSVETPLAN) in controlling EADs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and explain the role of the Australian Veterinary Emergency Plan (AUSVETPLAN) in controlling EADs.

pcs.text: Describe the potential impact of EADs on the livestock and meat industry
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Describe the potential impact of EADs on the livestock and meat industry?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Describe the potential impact of EADs on the livestock and meat industry.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify the reporting process for suspected EADs
